arts.ttl: Aston Villa XI vs Preston – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa travel to face Preston North End in the quarter-finals of the FA Cup this evening. Unai Emery’s team take on the lowest-ranked side remaining in the competition an are one win from a place in the last four for the first time in a decade. Villa are targeting a fifth consecutive win in […] The post Aston Villa XI vs Preston – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Preston vs Aston Villa – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Championship outfit Preston North End host Aston Villa in the FA Cup quarter-finals this Sunday. It is a historic encounter for the Lancashire-based club as it is the first time they have reached this stage of the competition since 1966. arts.sum: Aston Villa signed Marcus Rashford, Marco Asensio and Axel Disasi on loan at the start of February Unai Emery was reluctant to discuss Marco Asensio's future ahead of the final two months of Aston Villa's campaign.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery told me about Aston Villa's Wembley dream and 'how much' FA Cup means
arts.sum: “Of course, I know how much it means for the supporters to be there,” Emery said of playing at Wembley. Every time Unai Emery and his Aston Villa players arrive at Bodymoor Heath, they’re reminded of the many major honours the club has won in its decorated history.

arts.ttl: If I knew Aston Villa were going big in the transfer window, I'd give it another year
arts.sum: Downing, who acknowledged Jhon Duran's sale to Saudi side Al-Nassr in January, has been impressed by the squad that Emery and Monchi have assembled and thinks that, even if they come up short in their bid to return to the Champions League next term, no player should be in a rush to bid farewell. Former Aston Villa winger Stewart Downing doesn't believe anybody currently in the squad should be in a rush to leave the club this summer even if they fail to secure a second straight year in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Osimhen, Sesko, Ekitike - Aston Villa transfer round up ahead of summer window - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Dutch great Wesley Sneijder said of Ekitike earlier this season: “I might say something really crazy, but I’ll say it anyway: I think he’s a mix between Neymar and Kylian Mbappe. Aston Villa have been linked with a move to bring Victor Osimhen to the Premier League in the summer transfer window, after it was reported that he has no interest in switching to the Saudi Pro League and would rather test himself in the Premier League.
